title: set date automation to something other than today!
excerpt: Simple request to be able to set date to something other than today. Suggestion: Having a drop down where “today” is in “set date to today” that enables a user to choose from other date column values existing in an item. …

posts.author: ElectricEthen (Ethen Roth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Simple request to be able to set date to something other than today. Suggestion: Having a drop down where “today” is in “set date to today” that enables a user to choose from other date column values existing in an item.

Screenshot 2024-04-05 at 12.35.27 PM1267×416 23.5 KB

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ElectricEthen,

We recently launched the app Special Automations - monday.com App Marketplace which has the required automation recipe for your use case (by using date columns).

image2090×366 27.1 KB

Also if you want any other automation, do let us know at support@superworkday.com

Thanks
